text: The Department of the California Highway Patrol shall adopt and enforce rules and regulations relating to the equipment, maintenance, construction, design, color, and operation of schoolbuses.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.8. SAFETY REGULATIONS [34500 - 34520.5]
##### § 34508

The Department of the California Highway Patrol shall adopt and enforce rules and regulations relating to the equipment, maintenance, construction, design, color, and operation of schoolbuses.

*(Amended by Stats. 1981, Ch. 774, Sec. 11.)*

subsections.text: The Department of the California Highway Patrol shall adopt and enforce rules and regulations relating to the equipment, maintenance, construction, design, color, and operation of schoolbuses.
